content.en:
Through the conversation with the light-clothed saintess, Ye Tian learned more and more about the holy monument.

No one knows when the holy monument will appear, even if it is the lord of the holy realm, he will only be aware of it hundreds of thousands of years before the birth of the holy monument, and it is impossible to predict when the holy monument will be born.

In some holy realms, it takes a long time for the birth of the holy monument, while others will be born soon.

But in any case, once the Holy Monument was born, it would inevitably attract the attention of countless domain ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, since you have agreed, I will lend you the Jade Pure Bottle for the time being, and then return it to me when you step into the Supreme Domain Ancestral Realm, how about it?" the lightly-clothed Holy Maiden suggested.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The light-clothed saintess didn't ask Ye Tian to sign any agreement, obviously trusting Ye Tian very much.

Soon, the light-clothed saintess lifted the confession of the jade net bottle and handed over a crystal bottle to Ye Tian, which was a holy relic-the jade net bottle!

After Ye Tian accepted the jade bottle, he talked with the light-clothed saintess for a while, and then left here.

After returning to the human world, Ye Tian began to refine the Jade Pure Bottle, and it took some time to refine the Jade Pure Bottle and successfully recognize the master.

A place of retreat.

Ye Tian placed the Jade Purity Bottle in the void, and he himself entered the Jade Purity Bottle.

If you want to purify the domain body and domain power, you must enter the inside of the Jade Pure Bottle, and use the holy power of the Jade Pure Bottle to continuously purify the body, which is the correct way to use the Jade Pure Bottle.

Rumble!!!

The power of countless jade pure bottle holy relics washed Ye Tian's body, making Ye Tian's domain body and domain power continue to be refined, coupled with Ye Tian's endless domain law, the effect was very good, far faster than the previous pure speed I don't know how many times.

"At this rate, in a maximum of 2 million years, I can purify my physical body to the extreme, and then I can raise my soul to the extreme, and then I can start to impact the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm!" Ye Tian planned.

Time passes slowly –

Ye Tian hardly cares much about the outside world, unless something big happens.

However, in the following days, nothing major happened in the Xuanxu Saint Realm and Dao Mountain Realm.

It's just that some cultivation treasures and a lot of treasures were born, and a few more ordinary holy relics were born, one of which was obtained by the human race, but a few were snatched away by the supreme domain ancestors of other forces, but it also caused a fight, and many supreme domain ancestors fell.

Even if it was such a thing, Ye Tian did not appear.

After all, ordinary holy relics are not of high value to him, so there is no need to fight for them.

At present, it is more important for him to seize the time to practice.

In fact, Ye Tian's copy body could also be dispatched, but those few holy relics were born too quickly, so he didn't have time to participate.

In any case, there are many areas where Ye Qingtian's copy body is completely controlled, and even if some treasures are found, it is the first time that the Terran Domain Ancestor arrives, so most of the precious resources have fallen into the hands of the Terran.

Only a very small number of precious resources would be snatched away by the supreme domain ancestors of other forces.

Moreover, the Supreme Domain Ancestor, who had behaved more excessively, would have been found by Ye Tian if he hadn't left the Xuanxu Saint Realm in the end, and then killed them one by one.

In the blink of an eye, more than 2 million years have passed.

"The domain body and domain power are finally refined to the extreme!"

Ye Tian muttered.

I have to say that the power of the Jade Pure Bottle is really awesome, and almost all the strong people in the Holy Maiden Sect who have the Jade Pure Bottle can easily refine the domain body and domain power to the extreme, and promote them to a higher realm with the most perfect attitude.

Of course, the jade net bottle is so awesome, and it is impossible to use it indefinitely.

For example, Ye Tian has used it for more than 2 million years in a row, and he has used too much of the power of the Jade Pure Bottle Holy Relics, and he almost overdrew the potential of the Jade Pure Bottle.

Nowadays, the effect of the jade bottle is many times worse, if you want it to return to its original effect, I am afraid it will take a long time, or use special methods to restore it.

However, Ye Tian would not restore the method of the Jade Pure Bottle, it is estimated that only the people of the Holy Maiden Sect would have that method.

At this time, Ye Tian didn't need the Jade Pure Bottle.

Now, he only needs to raise his soul to a certain level again, and he can directly impact the Powerful Domain Ancestor Realm.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian entered the Soul Saint Realm, and in the core area of the Soul Saint Realm, he endured the impact of countless black shadows, constantly refining his soul until he couldn't hold on anymore, and then withdrew to recover his soul power.

In this way, Ye Tian continued to refine his soul, and his progress was very fast.

Ye Tian has been refining for millions of years, and it is difficult for his soul to continue to improve, at least it is difficult to continue his soul in ordinary ways.

Although Ye Tian can still find a way to refine his soul, there is no need to continue refining, the soul at this level is already very perfect, if he really wants to refine his soul to the level of soul holy light, then there is no need for perfection.

In other words, Ye Tian could now impact the Supreme Domain Ancestral Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian began to retreat and impact the Supreme Domain Ancestral Realm!

Generally, it is difficult for a top-level domain ancestor to raise his domain body to the level of a supreme domain body, and only if the holy body is strong enough and the potential is high enough, can he allow his top-level domain body to transform into a supreme domain body.

Ye Tian's holy body is an eternal immortal holy body, although it has not yet reached the limit level, but it has also reached the perfection in the consummation realm, and it is only one step away from the ultimate level.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body continued to cause qualitative changes in the top domain body, coupled with the operation of the Endless Domain Law, making Ye Tian's breakthrough very easy and easy.

Click!!!!

The shackles in the darkness were broken, and the top domain began to undergo qualitative changes.

As time passed, countless energies poured into Ye Tian's body, prompting his top domain body to evolve, and the aura on his body became more and more powerful.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's body began to permeate the aura of the strongest domain body.

this day.

Ye Tian's top-notch domain body has completely transformed to the level of the supreme domain body, and the domain power on his body has also begun to transform into the supreme domain power, and his soul has also begun to make great progress, and it is rapidly improving every moment.

Ye Tian's potential was too great, so he broke through to the level of the Supreme Domain Body, and the extent of his strength improvement was also extremely exaggerated.

A long time passed, and Ye Tiancai truly completed the breakthrough.

And he used the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm to cover up his breakthrough, so no one knew that he had successfully broken through.

Of course, once he appeared in the outside world, the news could not be hidden.

But at that time, he had completely stabilized his realm, and his strength had reached an extremely terrifying level!
